Georgia, statewide

Real Estate Lawyers in Georgia

331 listings statewide

Compare top rated real estate lawyers across Georgia. We list 331 property & real estate practices, both established law firms and solo attorneys, with ratings, reviews, and direct contact. Georgia is an 'attorney closing' state, so a licensed attorney typically conducts residential and commercial real estate closings. Real estate lawyers handle title issues, contracts, and disputes.

Frequently asked questions

How many real estate lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 331 real estate lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a real estate lawyer in Georgia?

Georgia is an 'attorney closing' state, so a licensed attorney typically conducts residential and commercial real estate closings. Real estate lawyers handle title issues, contracts, and disputes.

Who is a top real estate lawyer in Georgia?

Campbell & Brannon - Alpharetta in Alpharetta is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 471 reviews.
